goal: Native built-ins, builtin module aliases, and GC/concurrency foundation
new_in_2_9_6: native terminal I/O built-ins: println, write, input, readline, read_line, ask
native system built-ins: args, argv, cwd, sleep_ms, exit
native syscall implementation split into mellowrt_syscalls.c/.h
builtin module alias imports for io, sys, math, time, gc, thread, and chan
native mark/sweep GC for runtime-owned channel handles via gc_collect and gc_stats
green-thread foundation built-ins: spawn and yield
native FIFO channel foundation built-ins: channel, send, and recv
native runtime syscall IDs and documentation kept aligned with the v2.9.6 foundation APIs
runtime_notes: channels are native FIFO handles in the C runtime
spawn/yield expose cooperative scheduling API shape but do not yet implement full M:N stack switching
runtime_policy: Native C is the release-authoritative runtime for v2.9.6 core work
default C execution must fail fast when native support is missing
release and CI validation should run native-only execution
